ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., LinearRegression, GaussianNB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model it belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., session, userid) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the feature (e.g., database, API) */,
  "is_target" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feature is the target variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model it belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., fit_intercept) */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_tunable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is tunable during grid search */,
  "tuning_range" TEXT /* Range or set of values for tuning the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model it belongs to */,
  "train_rmse" REAL /* RMSE of the model on the training dataset */,
  "train_median_error" REAL /* Median error of the model on the training dataset */,
  "train_r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model on the training dataset */,
  "test_rmse" REAL /* RMSE of the model on the test dataset */,
  "test_median_error" REAL /* Median error of the model on the test dataset */,
  "test_r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model on the test dataset */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the training dataset (for classification models) */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test dataset (for classification models) */,
  "train_f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the training dataset (for classification models) */,
  "test_f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the test dataset (for classification models) */,
  "train_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the training dataset (for classification models) */,
  "test_precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on the test dataset (for classification models) */,
  "train_recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the training dataset (for classification models) */,
  "test_recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on the test dataset (for classification models) */,
  "train_auc_roc" REAL /* AUC-ROC score of the model on the training dataset (for classification models) */,
  "test_auc_roc" REAL /* AUC-ROC score of the model on the test dataset (for classification models) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., training, validation, testing) */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_search_results" (
  "grid_search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid search result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model evaluated */,
  "param_combination" TEXT /* Combination of parameters used in the grid search */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics achieved with this parameter combination */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., grid search, random search) */,
  "search_status" TEXT /* Status of the search (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "best_param_combination" TEXT /* Best parameter combination found */,
  "best_performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics achieved with the best parameter combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_search_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, data scientist) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compare_models" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "model_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first model */,
  "model_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second model */,
  "comparison_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used for comparison (e.g., RMSE, R-squared) */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., performance, feature importance) */,
  "comparison_status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "comparison_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the comparison results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_models_model_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_2") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compare_models_model_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("model_id_1") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
